",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Arch4edu 是面向高校用户推出的非官方软件仓库，支持 Arch Linux 和 Arch Linux ARM，主要包含高校用户常用的科研、教学及开发软件。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"

"]}],"

",["$r","li",null,{"children":["在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/pacman.conf"}]," 文件末尾添加以下内容："]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/pacman.conf","enableQuickSetup":true,"append":true}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["[",["$r","strong",null,{"children":"不推荐"}],"] 不导入 GPG key，并直接在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/pacman.conf"}]," 文件末尾添加以下内容："]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/pacman.conf","enableQuickSetup":true,"append":true}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("[arch4edu]");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("SigLevel = Never");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("Server = ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/$arch");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
